input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.2.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.2.1.1
            TITLE: a jacking point must be provided at the rear of the vehicle

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.2.1.1: A Jacking Point must be provided at the rear of the vehicle
VE.2.1.1 A Jacking Point must be provided at the rear of the vehicle
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 75 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: A Jacking Point must be provided at the rear of the vehicle
